# Conar

> Conar is an AI-powered, open-source database client for Postgres, MySQL, MSSQL, and ClickHouse. It lets developers write queries, explore and edit data, and manage databases with AI handling the complexity. Available as a native desktop app for macOS, Windows, and Linux.

## Key facts

- Supported databases: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Microsoft SQL Server (MSSQL), ClickHouse
- Platforms: macOS (Apple Silicon & Intel), Windows, Linux (DEB, RPM, AppImage)
- Open source: https://github.com/wannabespace/conar
- Install via Homebrew: `brew install --cask conar`

## Pages

- [Home](https://conar.app): Product overview, features, and pricing
- [Download](https://conar.app/download): Download links for macOS, Windows, and Linux
- [Releases](https://conar.app/releases): Changelog and version history
- [Privacy Policy](https://conar.app/privacy-policy): How Conar handles your data
- [Terms of Service](https://conar.app/terms-of-service): Terms and conditions
